next_action: Promote selected route-family classifications into component-owned route bindings only after proof, lifecycle, and authority witnesses exist.
purpose: Bind currently declared component-owned route families to registered component IDs and proof surfaces while preserving blocked-action authority boundaries.

route_bindings.notes: Gateway governance routes are bound as proof surfaces only; the inventory does not grant route execution authority.
Agentic service harness status is a read-only route binding.
SNet is currently proof-bound through docs, fixtures, and validators rather than a mounted API route.
InceptaDive shadow is bound to its console posture and evidence routes plus bounded advisory inspection routes; no binding grants execution authority.
Personal Assistant routes are read/draft projections only; send and mutation paths stay blocked.
TeamOps route binding covers the plan projection only; provider write and send stay blocked.
Gmail account binding remains validator and handoff evidence only; generic connector routes are not treated as Gmail live authority.
Worker runtime is proof-bound as a runtime mesh surface rather than a mounted API route.
Capability worker route binding remains restricted and signed; the inventory does not admit product live dispatch.
Nested Mind bridge has no declared route binding in foundation posture.

route_family_classifications.notes: Route family classification records proof-surface ownership posture only; it does not grant route execution authority.
